**Links will be ignored, please upload your icon/image.**

**Again, read main rules: low quality images of products will be ignored, if you can not be bothered to search we won't either.**

**Off-type icons will not be accepted. Home Assistant makes it visible when an entity is on or off; it is useless to weigh down the library.**
